name: 规则与证据 -> 统一事实、动作建议与正式报告
producer_obligations: Stage5 must emit authoritative dual-gate ids/status and review_request metadata whenever review or block paths are entered.
Stage5 must keep H-05 payloads aligned with rule_hit/evidence/formal gate records rather than free-form Stage6 defaults.
Stage5 must not drop review_request metadata when Stage6 unified fact closure still depends on review or supplement loops.
consumer_obligations: Stage6 must consume Stage5 dual-gate outputs and review_request as the authoritative gate conclusion inputs for project_fact, review_queue_profile, and report_record.
Stage6 may project Stage5 dual-gate results into sale_gate_status, review queue, and report status, but must not recompute rule_gate_status or evidence_gate_status from raw evidence or Stage4 inputs.
BLOCK and REVIEW dispositions must follow Stage5 gate authority and review_request semantics, not free-form Stage6 heuristics.
Any private supplement loop created in Stage6 must stay linked to review_request and remain isolated from the public formal chain.
